title: Data Integration Intent Object
description: Defines the anatomy of an incoming data source as it enters the staging environment. Captures both structural metadata and declared intent, enabling AI agents to propose ERD relationships and proactively surface conflicts before pipeline activation.

intent.description: Architect-declared or AI-inferred purpose of this data source

declaredGoal.description: What the architect intends this data to do in the system
declaredGoal.example: Extend unified customer profile with supply chain order history

inferredByAI.description: Whether the intent was inferred by AI (true) or declared by user (false)

confidenceScore.description: AI confidence in the inferred intent (1.0 = certain, 0.0 = unknown)

domainContext.description: Business domain this data belongs to

targetEntity.description: The primary entity this data describes

source.description: Metadata about the incoming data source

connectionId.description: Unique identifier for the source connection

samplePayload.description: Representative sample of raw incoming records

fieldCount.description: Total number of fields in the raw schema

structuralAnalysis.description: AI-generated structural assessment of field compatibility against existing schemas

identityFields.description: Fields the AI has identified as likely identity or join keys

mappingCandidates.description: AI-proposed field-to-target mappings at batch level

transformHint.description: e.g. date format normalization, string to enum coercion

conflicts.description: Structural conflicts detected between source and existing graph

historicalOccurrences.description: How many times this conflict has appeared in prior dataflows

temporalProfile.description: Temporal characteristics — surfaced as insights for architect review, not AI decisions

dataFreshness.description: Expected lag between event occurrence and data availability

historicalDepth.description: How far back this source's data goes

volatilityScore.description: How frequently fields in this source type have changed historically (AI-observed)

architectControlRequired.description: Temporal decisions always require architect review — AI informs, does not decide

approvalStatus.description: Architect approval state — batch level, not field-by-field

etlEnhancements.description: AI-surfaced ETL opportunities to enrich Unified Profile and downstream destinations

metadata.sprintContext: Data Mapping with Intent — POC Day 1
